name: Step guide
when_to_use: 需要按明确顺序教授一个过程，并为每步配解释、要点和提示时用它：适合操作教程、上手指南、检查流程和回答中的可执行步骤。若只需展示简短里程碑，应改用 timeline；若步骤存在分支或状态流转，应改用流程图；若用户必须逐项勾选并回传进度，则需要任务组件。
why_valuable: 长教程容易退化成编号墙；本模板用连续轨道、醒目的步号、分层正文、要点列表和语义 tip callout 把动作与解释绑定，同时保持全部内容在首屏可扫读且无需折叠交互。

data_in.note: data.steps 严格按执行顺序展示，不自动排序。每步 body 可传单个字符串或段落字符串数组；bullets 是该步的补充动作清单；tip 是可选局部提示，variant 决定 icon 与颜色。label 适合放阶段名或耗时。模板只展示过程，不保存完成状态，也没有展开、勾选或回传。

schema.title?: string —— 教程标题；省略时显示 “Step-by-step guide”
schema.intro?: string —— 标题下的目标、前置条件或结果说明；省略时显示步骤数量摘要
schema.steps: {title:string,label?:string,body:string|string[],bullets?:string[],tip?:{variant?:'tip'|'note'|'warning'|'success',title?:string,body:string}}[] —— 按执行顺序排列的步骤

_stepFields.title: string —— 步骤动作标题
_stepFields.label?: string —— 阶段、预计耗时或短元信息
_stepFields.body: string|string[] —— 一段或多段正文；数组中的每项渲染为独立段落
_stepFields.bullets?: string[] —— 正文后的要点列表

_tipFields.variant?: 'tip'|'note'|'warning'|'success' —— 默认 tip；分别使用灯泡、信息、警告、成功语义
_tipFields.title?: string —— 提示标题；省略时使用 variant 名称

spec.note: 按步骤、段落、要点和提示数量自然增高；连接轨道随内容延伸。无折叠、内部滚动、vh 或载体尺寸测量。

example._why: 一份完整的手冲咖啡教程包含阶段标签、多段正文、动作要点和 tip／warning／success 三类局部提示，可验证长内容下的连接轨道、层级和移动端可读性。

minimal.title: Brew a balanced pour-over
minimal.intro: A repeatable four-step recipe for one bright, clean cup using 20 g of coffee and 320 g of water.

steps.title: Heat and prepare
steps.label: Prep · 3 min
steps.body: Heat water to 94°C, place the filter in the dripper, and rinse it thoroughly over your server.
bullets: Set the server on a scale

tip.title: Water matters
tip.body: Filtered water with moderate mineral content gives clearer sweetness than distilled or very hard water.

steps.title: Grind and bloom
body: Grind 20 g of coffee medium-fine, similar to table salt, and level the bed.
Start the timer and pour 60 g of water, making sure every ground is wet.

tip.title: Avoid a dry pocket
tip.body: A pale or bubbling patch means the bloom is uneven; target it with a small, controlled pour.

steps.title: Build the brew
steps.body: Pour slowly in two even pulses, keeping the water level steady and the stream away from the paper wall.

steps.title: Draw down and adjust
steps.label: Finish · 3:00
steps.body: Let the brewer drain completely, swirl the server, and taste once the cup has cooled slightly.
bullets: If sour, grind a little finer
If bitter or dry, grind a little coarser

tip.title: Target result
tip.body: A balanced cup should taste sweet and clear, with no hollow finish or lingering dryness.

uplink: 纯 display，无 uplink；步骤、要点和提示只读展示，不记录完成状态或向 AI 回传进度。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to teach a process in a clear order, with explanations, key points, and tips for each step. It suits operational tutorials, getting-started guides, check procedures, and actionable steps in an answer. If you only need short milestones, use timeline instead. If steps branch or transition between states, use a flowchart. If users must check off items and report progress, use a task component.
en.why_valuable: Long tutorials easily degrade into walls of numbered text. This template binds actions to explanations with a continuous track, prominent step numbers, layered body text, bullet lists, and semantic tip callouts, while keeping all content scannable without collapse interaction.

data_in.note: data.steps is displayed strictly in execution order and is not sorted automatically. Each step's body may be a single string or an array of paragraph strings. bullets is the step's supplementary action list; tip is an optional local callout whose variant controls icon and color. label suits a phase name or duration. The template only presents a process: it does not store completion state and has no expansion, checking, or reporting.

schema.title?: string -- Tutorial title; shows "Step-by-step guide" when omitted
schema.intro?: string -- Goal, prerequisite, or outcome below the title; shows a step-count summary when omitted

_stepFields.title: string -- Step action title
_stepFields.label?: string -- Phase, estimated duration, or short metadata
_stepFields.body: string|string[] -- One or more body paragraphs; each array item renders as a separate paragraph
_stepFields.bullets?: string[] -- Key-point list after the body
_stepFields.tip?: {variant?:'tip'|'note'|'warning'|'success',title?:string,body:string} -- Optional callout card within the step

_tipFields.variant?: 'tip'|'note'|'warning'|'success' -- Default tip; uses lightbulb, information, warning, and success semantics respectively
_tipFields.title?: string -- Callout title; uses the variant name when omitted

spec.note: Height grows naturally with the number of steps, paragraphs, points, and callouts; the connecting track extends with content. No collapse, internal scrolling, vh, or carrier-size measurement.
